text:
The new, fully redesigned collection includes this Artelier Date 38.00 mm version. This contemporary, intentional expression of a classic and much-loved Oris design is a statement, designed for and by the next generation of Swiss Made mechanical watch lovers.

#Oris #ArtelierDate #WatchesandWonders2026 #WWG26

In the mid-20th century, Oris was in a battle to overturn the Swiss Watch Statute. Thanks to Dr Rolf Portmann, it was a battle it would win.

#Oris #StarEdition #WatchesandWonders2026 #WWG26

The new Oris Star Edition is a faithful revival of one of
the most significant watches in Oris history. As with
the original, it captures a striking modern elegance

#Oris #StarEdition #WatchesandWonders2026 #WWG26

The new Artelier Complication. A deliberately modern watch that reimagines two classic functions — moon phase and a second time zone — for a new generation of independent minds. The dial is available in three colours: ivory, midnight blue and chestnut.

#Oris #ArtelierComplication #WatchesandWonders2026 #WWG26

The Artelier Calibre 113, one of the most innovative mechanical watches we’ve ever made. Inside its pure, urbane 43.00 mm stainless steel case is Oris Calibre 113, an in-house developed movement with a 10-day power reserve and a non-linear power reserve indicator. This unique combination of complications is typical of Oris’s insightful, independent approach to mechanical watchmaking.

#Oris #ArtelierCalibre113 #WatchesandWonders2026 #WWG26

Oris is pleased to introduce the Big Crown Pointer Date. This year, this sporty expression of our signature design returns, with a simple, classic, timeless black dial.

#Oris #BigCrownPointerDate #WatchesandWonders2026 #WWG26

The Artelier urban dress watch returns. This contemporary, intentional expression of a classic and much-loved Oris design is a statement, designed for and by the next generation of Swiss Made mechanical watch lovers.

#Oris #ArtelierDate #WatchesandWonders2026 #WWG26

A Star is reborn. In 1965, Oris changed the Swiss watch industry forever. A year later, the first Oris lever escapement watch arrived. Sixty years on, the Oris Star Edition celebrates these milestone events.

#Oris #StarEdition #WatchesandWonders2026 #WWG26

Our urban dress watch is back and ready to stand out. With its clean lines and modern profile, the Artelier Complication is a watch for a new generation of independent minds.

#Oris #ArtelierComplication #WatchesandWonders2026 #WWG26

The Big Crown has been with us since 1938 — and somehow, it never gets old.

One of the favourites from today's collection. The bronze that patinates with every hour you wear it.

#Oris #BigCrown

Mechanical watches bring us joy. Some days a watch reminds you of that more than others. 

#Oris #BigCrown #Calibre113
